one_time_description: Government of Canada Drinking Water Settlement received; also settled 2017 wildfire expense reimbursement with ISC for $452,000 vs recorded $501,689 (reduction of $49,689 to surplus)
economic_notes: Nation has investments in government business entities including Tl'etinqox Government Economic Development, Tl'etinqox Government Economic Development Corporation LLP, Chilcotin River Trading Company LLP, Dechen Ventures LP, Dechen Ventures Ltd., and Chilcotin River Trading Company Ltd. Also participates in BC First Nation Gaming Revenue Sharing LP.
notes: GBEs accounted for under modified equity method showed a loss of $858,439 in 2023 vs earnings of $2,076,861 in 2022. Nation settled 2017 wildfire expense claim with ISC for $452,000 vs recorded $501,689 causing a $49,689 reduction in 2023 surplus. Drinking water settlement of $500,000 received. Budget figures included for comparison (unaudited). Expenses include Capital $1,118,587 and Own Source $716,882 categories. Audit report dated March 3, 2024 for fiscal year ended March 31, 2023.
